message:
fix(server,storage,share): TUI headless detach deadlock, WBQ restartability, image error propagation, and probe hardening

Seven areas of improvement spanning server lifecycle, storage reliability,
deployment tooling, and HTTP probe correctness.

TUI Headless Detach Deadlock Fix (server crate):
- New tui_startup_should_stop() checks both shutdown and headless-detach flags,
  replacing bare is_shutdown_requested() in wait_for_first_paint,
  wait_for_tui_db_readiness, and sleep_with_tui_shutdown
- request_headless_detach() notifies startup condvar so blocked threads wake
- Detach path joins deferred worker thread before stopping DB poller, then
  explicitly starts background workers (prevents deadlock)
- mark_first_paint() moved to END of view() so deferred workers don't race
  with first frame; new FirstPaintProbeScreen test helper and two new tests

Write-Behind Queue Restartability (storage crate):
- WBQ sender wrapped in Mutex<Option<SyncSender>> (was OnceLock), allowing
  clear-on-shutdown and replace-on-restart
- lifecycle mutex serializes start/shutdown sequences
- wbq_start_inner() checks drain thread status and respawns if needed
- wbq_shutdown() flushes under lifecycle lock and clears sender

Markdown Image Processing Error Propagation:
- process_markdown_images now propagates errors with ? instead of silently
  skipping failed conversions
- Proper error codes: INVALID_ARGUMENT for bad paths, ARCHIVE_ERROR for others
- New markdown_has_processable_local_images() skips archive init when body
  only has remote URLs; empty attachment lists treated as None

Shell Quoting for Paths with Spaces (executor crate):
- New decode_shell_single_argument() handles single-quoted strings and
  backslash escapes for create_output_dir/create_nojekyll steps
- path_from_simple_shell_command() helper and tests for paths with spaces
  and apostrophes

Provider Inference from CLI Flags (planner + prompt crates):
- New infer_provider_from_inputs() deduces provider from --github-repo,
  --s3-bucket, --cloudflare-project, --netlify-site without requiring
  --provider explicitly
- Beats environment auto-detection; detects conflicts and contradictions
- Integrated into both interactive and non-interactive flows

HTTP Probe Hardening:
- Configurable User-Agent via config.user_agent (was hardcoded)
- sanitized_header_value() strips control characters
- Redirect resolution handles scheme-relative URLs, query-only/fragment-only
  redirects, fragment stripping, parent-directory segments, trailing slashes
- New normalize_redirect_path() resolves . and .. segments

Malformed Attachment JSON Tolerance (finalize crate):
- Materialized view SQL uses CASE WHEN json_valid() for attachment_count
  and json_each() source, preventing crashes on malformed JSON

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
